known_issues: Admin authorization in deleteMediaAsset needs debugging - caller principal, user data, and role detection require logging

new_feature_requests.summary: Add debug logging to deleteMediaAsset function in backend/main.mo to log the current caller principal when the function is called
Add debug logging to deleteMediaAsset function in backend/main.mo to log the retrieved user data from storage after looking up the caller
Add debug logging to deleteMediaAsset function in backend/main.mo to log the detected role value from the user data
Modify the error message returned by deleteMediaAsset in backend/main.mo to include the detected role value when authorization fails
